field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: PPEC eluted at similar elution volume irrespective of their molar mass while using mobile phase containing 92% ACN, 7% water and 1% TEA
field_evidence.critical_component: These are so called chromatographic critical conditions of PPEC on RP column
field_evidence.column_name: ZORBAX ODS, 70 Å pore, 5 µm particle, 250×4.6 mm dimensions
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: mixture of acetonitrile (ACN) and double deionizedwater with 1.0% trimethylamine (TEA)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The temperature of column oven was mainau=» tained at 30 Ga»[o] C
field_evidence.flow_rate: mobile phase flow rate was set at 0.5 mL/min

conditions.notes: Established using PPEC homopolymers of varying molar masses (500 to 5000 g/mol).
conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: all PEG standards elute at the same volume irrespective of their molar mass
field_evidence.critical_component: These are so called LCCC of PEGs in a given solvent/sorbent system
field_evidence.column_name: PhenoSphere-Next 5u Sil column, 120 Å E(EwUoU(w(ww wes au=» pore, 5 µm particle, 250×4.6 mm dimensions
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: mixture of THF a=» and DMF
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: The temperature of column oven was mainau=» tained at 30 Ga»[o] C
field_evidence.flow_rate: mobile phase flow rate was set at 0.5 mL/min

conditions.notes: Established using PEG homopolymers. Note: Elution volume is ahead of expected void volume due to hydroxyl end-group interaction.
conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: MeO-PEGs of varying molar masses eluted earlier than PEGs independent of molar mass
field_evidence.critical_component: MeO-PEGs of varying molar masses eluted earlier than PEGs independent of molar mass
